rationale: The citing paper studies multimedia attribution and budget allocation with carryover and cross-media interactions across online/offline outcomes, while the cited paper directly estimates cross-channel effects of traditional/display/paid search advertising on online and offline sales with AdStock and endogeneity correction. This strong construct and modeling overlap suggests the cited work is plausibly a substantive prior (theory/mechanism/empirical benchmark), so it is not safe to drop as an obvious mention-only citation.
